title: Microsoft Fabric Workspace Tag Sync Configuration
description: Configure synchronization of workspace metadata and tags from Microsoft Fabric / Power BI to Atlan

fabric_tenant_id.title: Azure AD Tenant ID
fabric_tenant_id.description: Azure Active Directory (Entra ID) tenant ID for authentication

fabric_client_id.title: Service Principal Client ID
fabric_client_id.description: Azure AD application (service principal) client ID with Power BI Admin API access

fabric_scope.title: OAuth Scope
fabric_scope.description: OAuth scope for Power BI / Fabric API access

tag_namespace.title: Tag Namespace
tag_namespace.description: Prefix/namespace for tags managed by this app (e.g., 'capacity', 'pillar'). Tags from this namespace will be updated by the app.

capacity_tag_key.title: Capacity Tag Key
capacity_tag_key.description: Key to use for capacity tags (e.g., 'capacity'). Tags will be formatted as 'key:capacity_name'.

atlan_connection_qualified_name.title: Atlan Power BI Connection Qualified Name
atlan_connection_qualified_name.description: Qualified name of the Power BI connection in Atlan (e.g., 'default/powerbi/1234567890'). Used to locate PowerBIWorkspace assets.

workspace_filter_regex.title: Workspace Filter Regex (Optional)
workspace_filter_regex.description: Optional regular expression to filter workspaces by name. Only matching workspaces will be processed.
